project.name: Sylphx Skills
project.summary: Public canonical static instructions and automatic Codex/Claude distribution.

goals: Own canonical static instructions under skills/<id>/.
Keep Codex and Claude Code synchronized without manual per-skill installation.
Publish Sylphx working methods and Platform guidance as useful public product surfaces.
nonGoals: Own live fleet/work/effect state or customer data.
Operate a benchmark laboratory, admission authority, hosted marketplace, or Control Plane.
Preserve retired instruction copies outside Git history.

owns.name: Static instruction packages
owns.description: Public standards, procedures, profiles, adapters, and self-contained references.

owns.name: Runtime synchronization
owns.description: Small install, update, status, clear, and auto-sync adapters for Codex and Claude Code.

doesNotOwn: Live fleet adoption, work claims, effects, or operational customer state.
Product-local decisions, runtime implementation, or model benchmark results.
forbiddenCouplings: No Control Plane, credential, customer-data, benchmark, or model-provider dependency.
No generated or secondary writable copy of Skill semantics.

delivery.terminalBoundary: Exact default-branch tree passes the single package and installer integrity check.

commercial.metricsSourceOfTruth: Package and product telemetry only where separately authorized.
guardrails: Do not represent MIT-licensed public text as exclusive.
Commercial services may include managed updates, private packages, profiles, integrations, verification, and support.
